core_mechanism: Interference among the eigenmodes of an array of N linearly coupled resonators (coupled-oscillator system), where destructive interference between coupled resonant pathways opens multiple narrow transparency windows in the transmission spectrum
brief_reason: The abstract describes N periodically coupled whispering-gallery-mode resonators producing sharp, highly transparent frequency windows in direct analogy to multiple electromagnetically induced transparency, which is the hallmark of interference between coupled resonant modes.
